description: Turn 1 untap phase. Two companies at Rivendell: wigy (Aragorn II, Bilbo, Frodo) vs karmi (Elrond, Éowyn, Celeborn, Beregond). Both players have 8 cards in hand.

Free Council corruption checks. wigy called council with 16 MP after 1 deck exhaustion. Aragorn II (3 items) and Elrond at Barrow-downs vs AI-Random's 4 solo companies (Celeborn, Bilbo, Gandalf, Sam Gamgee).
